description.value: NEMSIS dConfiguration: state, permitted procedures/medications with certification levels, protocols, specialty service capability, billing status, EMD provision/vendor, patient monitoring capability, crew call signs, and dispatch centers. Repeat the extension per configured state (dConfiguration.01).

definition.value: NEMSIS dConfiguration: state, permitted procedures/medications with certification levels, protocols, specialty service capability, billing status, EMD provision/vendor, patient monitoring capability, crew call signs, and dispatch centers. Repeat the extension per configured state (dConfiguration.01).

definition.value: May be used to represent additional information that is not part of the basic definition of the element. Though any implementer can define an extension, there is a set of requirements that SHALL be met as part of the definition of the extension.

comment.value: There can be no stigma associated with the use of extensions by any application, project, or standard - regardless of the institution or jurisdiction that uses or defines the extensions. human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

definition.value: NEMSIS dConfiguration: state, permitted procedures/medications with certification levels, protocols, specialty service capability, billing status, EMD provision/vendor, patient monitoring capability, crew call signs, and dispatch centers. Repeat the extension per configured state (dConfiguration.01).

short.value: dConfiguration.01 - State Associated with this Configuration

comment.value: NEMSIS dConfiguration.01. Usage: Mandatory. 2-letter USPS abbreviation per NDR-004.

short.value: dConfiguration.06/.07 - EMS Agency Procedures with permitted certification levels

comment.value: NEMSIS dConfiguration.07 (SNOMED procedure code) with dConfiguration.06 (permitted certification levels). Repeat per procedure.

short.value: dConfiguration.06 - Certification level permitted to perform

comment.value: NEMSIS state certification/licensure levels; uses the eCrew.02 certification level codes.

short.value: dConfiguration.08/.09 - EMS Agency Medications with permitted certification levels

comment.value: NEMSIS dConfiguration.09 (RxNorm medication code) with dConfiguration.08 (permitted certification levels). Repeat per medication.

short.value: dConfiguration.08 - Certification level permitted to administer

comment.value: NEMSIS dConfiguration.10. Same 9914xxx protocol codes as eProtocols.01.

short.value: dConfiguration.11 - EMS Agency Specialty Service Capability

comment.value: NEMSIS dConfiguration.11. Usage: Recommended. Repeating (0..M).
NEMSIS dConfiguration.12. Usage: Optional. Whether the agency bills for service; NEMSIS YesNoValues mapped to boolean.

short.value: dConfiguration.13 - EMD Provided to EMS Agency Service Area

comment.value: NEMSIS dConfiguration.13. Usage: Mandatory.
NEMSIS dConfiguration.14. Usage: Recommended. Free-text vendor name. Repeating (0..M).
NEMSIS dConfiguration.15. Usage: Recommended. Repeating (0..M).
NEMSIS dConfiguration.16. Usage: Mandatory. Repeating (1..M).

short.value: dConfiguration.17 - Dispatch Center (CAD) Name or ID

comment.value: NEMSIS dConfiguration.17. Usage: Optional. Repeating (0..M).
